steps.title: Set up the rate calculation
steps.content: To find revolutions per minute, divide the total number of revolutions by the total time in minutes: $$\frac{960 \text{ revolutions}}{60 \text{ minutes}}$$

steps.title: Simplify and find the rate
steps.content: $$\frac{960}{60} = \frac{96}{6} = 16$$ The turbine completes 16 revolutions per minute, so A is correct.
